Mac Plus / SE — System 6.0.8 (B&W).label: 1-bit black & white for a compact Mac (Plus/SE/Classic, ≤4 MB). Smallest image; no Color QuickDraw needed.

Macintosh LC / II — System 7.1 (Colour).label: 256-colour build with a 1-bit art fallback. For a colour-capable 68k Mac.

Macintosh II — System 7.1 (Millions).label: 24-bit 'millions of colours' art (+ 8-bit and 1-bit fallbacks). For a Mac II with a 24-bit display card; the launcher picks the variant matching the screen depth.

Quadra 800 — System 7.5.5 (Millions, ful.label: Top-end: System 7.5.5 on a 68040 Quadra 800 with 24-bit art and a roomy partition. Verify in QEMU's q800 machine (Snow tops out at Mac II).
